title: Differential network analysis
summary: Compare biological networks between conditions and identify rewired relationships with explicit construction and interpretation assumptions.
test_prompts: Plan a differential-network analysis and explain how you would keep network-construction assumptions visible in the final interpretation.
Summarize the QC gates that must pass before a rewired network edge should be treated as biologically meaningful.

title: Reference panel preparation
summary: Select, prepare, and document reference panels for phasing or imputation with explicit ancestry and build compatibility.
test_prompts: Explain how you would choose and prepare a reference panel for imputation without hiding ancestry or build mismatches.
Tell me what must be documented before a reference panel can be treated as ready for phasing or imputation.

title: Public dataset SQL access
summary: Query public datasets with read-only SQL and explicit schema, cost, and provenance safeguards.
test_prompts: Plan a read-only public-dataset SQL step and explain how you would keep schema assumptions, cost, and provenance explicit.
Summarize the checks you would run before treating a public-dataset query result as analysis-ready.

title: Cohort variable discovery
summary: Discover cohort variables and field candidates for a research question without losing dataset-specific context and metadata.
test_prompts: Explain how you would discover cohort variables for a research question and still keep field-level provenance and scope clear.
Tell me what makes a cohort-variable shortlist good enough for downstream analysis planning.

title: Reference and cohort access workflow
summary: Coordinate reference-panel selection, cohort-field discovery, and public-dataset access into a reusable resource-preparation workflow.
test_prompts: Outline a workflow that starts from a research question and ends with reference resources, cohort fields, or public-data access choices that downstream analysis can actually reuse.
Adapt a resource-access workflow for a project that needs both imputation panel preparation and UK Biobank variable discovery.
